title: Custard Crumble Cake
description: A classic Italian dessert featuring a crumble topping over a rich custard cake.
instructions: Grease a 9-inch springform pan and set aside.
In a medium bowl, whisk together sugar and eggs until light and fluffy.
Pour custard mixture into prepared pan and smooth top.
In a separate bowl, mix crumble topping with a fork until crumbly.
Spread crumble topping evenly over custard mixture.
Bake for 40-45 minutes, or until golden brown and set.
Remove from oven and let cool on a wire rack for 10 minutes.
Serve warm, topped with powdered sugar if desired.
